global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design with a focus on financial services.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial service with easy signup and instant card.

elements.label: Soft green background
elements.description: A smooth, soft green background that fills the entire banner.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'CoinBridge' in a modern font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A combination of circles and rectangles in varying sizes, lightly overlaid on the background.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Your money, clearer' with a smaller tagline 'Fast signup, instant card' underneath.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Book now' in white, set against a darker green background at the bottom.

elements.label: Tagline text
elements.description: Smaller text below the headline that provides additional information about the service.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with soft colors, CoinBridge logo, clear messaging
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
